title: More Advancements REMADE
description: The old more advancements mod for fabric but it works on 1.21 and its a datapack now suckers.
body:
This is a datapack designed with the goal of adding more goals, achievments, and challenges for the player to face during their playthrough. Some may be extremely tedious, but thats the point of minecraft, after all, if it was easy, then you wouldn't be playing for very long, would you?

Anyway, this datapack adds a rather moderate sum of advancements to the game (in its own tree because i like having my own root dont steal my cats please) which one would generally want if they enjoy stuff like better than wolves easy mode. There are some reasonable achievements, like for collection, and "dieing" in specific ways (yes, totems work.)

Honestly you probably dont want to install this but if you do, go ahead. Please. Every 10 downloads/1 heart-thingies i add another advancement.


~~This is going to soley be used for a specific server.~~


Note: all advancements will have the funny identifier thingy "explosion:" Dont ask why.
Note 2: I am going to explode.
Note 3: This is a "meme datapack." No idea if this falls within that but thats what im going for so suit youslef. 
Note 4: fyi i made the original on an account i got locked out of. [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreadvancements) it is tho
